summary: Recent updates to the 2D graphics component of Firefox, known as Thebes, have focused on optimizing font handling and enhancing video processing capabilities. A key improvement is the **introduction of a fast-path in font range calculations**, which should significantly speed up text rendering for users, especially when dealing with large amounts of text. Additionally, the adjustments to hardware video decoding for macOS address important signing constraints, ensuring better security and reliability. The changes also enhance support for multi-GPU systems, which can improve graphics performance in various scenarios, especially in demanding applications or video rendering. These enhancements all contribute to a smoother and more efficient browsing experience.
